The live search and verification endpoints may be protected by technical access controls that this project does not bypass.

boards.boardName: Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners License Search
boards.agencyName: Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners
coverageLimitations: This source entry is scoped to plumbing licenses and registrations regulated by the Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners.
Texas electrical, air conditioning and refrigeration, general contractor, local permit, and local registration records are outside this source entry.
The free licensee-list page describes downloadable lists, but no OpenTrade adapter has validated a stable file shape yet.
Searches or downloads requiring protected interactive workflows are not automated by OpenTrade Registry.

evidence.note: Official TSBPE page reviewed; it lists plumbing license types including Tradesman Plumber-Limited, Journeyman Plumber, Master Plumber, and Plumbing Inspector.

boards.boardName: Utah DOPL Contractor License Lookup
boards.agencyName: Utah Division of Professional Licensing
coverageLimitations: Local permits, business registrations, and non-DOPL authorizations are outside this source entry.
Classification and qualifier details must be preserved before normalization.
Utah rules identify asbestos removal as regulated by the Department of Environmental Quality rather than requiring a DOPL contractor license.

evidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

boards.boardName: Virginia DPOR Contractor License Lookup
boards.agencyName: Virginia Department of Professional and Occupational Regulation
coverageLimitations: The lookup is not modeled as a confirmed bulk public dataset.
DPOR scope does not represent every local permit, business registration, or non-DPOR construction authorization in Virginia.

evidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

boards.boardName: U.S. Virgin Islands DLCA Construction Contractors and Trades License Search

boards.boardName: Vermont Secretary of State Residential Contractor Registry

Other trade licenses, local permits, business registrations, and non-OPR authorizations may require separate sources.

Related workers compensation, bond, insurance, infraction, and lawsuit details may require separate official sources or fields that need additional review before normalization.
